    ORDER BY [t].[TeacherID] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t2]

    SELECT DISTINCT [c].[ClassName]
    FROM [TeacherAssignment] AS [t0]
    INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [t0].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]

) AS [s0]

    SELECT [t].[TeacherID], [t].[TeacherName], [t].[TeacherEmail], COALESCE([t].[TeacherPhoneNumber], N'') AS [c], [t].[IsApproved]
    FROM [Teacher] AS [t]
    ORDER BY [t].[TeacherID] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t2]
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT DISTINCT [c].[ClassName]
    FROM [TeacherAssignment] AS [t0]
    INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [t0].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]

) AS [s0]

    FROM [Teacher] AS [t]
    ORDER BY [t].[TeacherID] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t2]

    SELECT DISTINCT [c].[ClassName]
    FROM [TeacherAssignment] AS [t0]
    INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [t0].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]
    WHERE [t0].[TeacherId] = [t2].[TeacherID]
) AS [s0]
